title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
